data.title: Second amendment extends revolving credit facility maturity
data.summary: Example Holdings, Inc. disclosed a second amendment to its revolving credit agreement that extends maturity and temporarily loosens one leverage covenant threshold. The payload is illustrative of the response model, not evidence of a live extraction backend.

terms.covenant_summary: Maximum net leverage ratio temporarily increased for specified 2026 fiscal quarters.

sources.excerpt: On April 9, 2026, Example Holdings, Inc. entered into a Second Amendment to its Revolving Credit Agreement.
The Revolving Credit Maturity Date is hereby amended to June 30, 2029, and the maximum net leverage ratio shall be increased for specified 2026 quarters.

data.extraction_notes: Illustrative docs-first example. Key amendment terms appear extractable from the 8-K and Exhibit 10.1, but the full agreement should still be reviewed.

time_semantics.date_fields: Calendar dates when only a day is disclosed; null when no reliable date can be extracted.
time_semantics.cursor_sort: Descending by filing timestamp, then event_id
